song.title: The Name of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) The name of Jesus is so sweet, I love its music to repeat; It makes my joys full and complete, The precious name of Jesus.
[C] Chorus Jesus! oh, how sweet the name, Jesus! every day the same; Jesus! let all saints proclaim Its worthy praise forever.
[V2] 2) I love the name of Him whose heart Knows all my griefs and bears a part; Who bids all anxious fears depart, I love the name of Jesus.
[V3] 3) That name I fondly love to hear, It never fails my heart to cheer, Its music dries the falling tear; Exalt the name of Jesus.
[V4] 4) No word of man can ever tell How sweet the name I love so well, Oh, let its praises ever swell, Oh, praise the name of Jesus.
song.author: William C. Martin
